subtitle: AI Dog Finder & Tracker
keywords: stray dog, lost pet, dog finder, animal rescue, AI, dog breed, India, Chennai, pet tracker
shortDescription: AI-powered app to identify, track, and help stray dogs across Indian cities.
fullDescription:
PawTrace India uses cutting-edge AI to create digital passports for stray dogs, help reunite lost pets with their owners, and support animal rescue efforts.

Key Features:
- AI Dog Scanning: Take a photo and instantly identify breed, color, size, and distinguishing marks using YOLO and MobileNet computer vision
- Visual Search: Upload a photo of a lost pet and find matching dogs in the database using feature-based similarity matching
- Dog Passports: Every scanned dog gets a unique digital passport with QR code, photo gallery, and health records
- Community Reports: Report stray, injured, or lost dogs with GPS tagging so rescuers can find them
- Real-time Dashboard: Track community statistics — dogs spotted, rescued, and reunited
- Multi-city Support: Available across Chennai, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Delhi, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Pune, and Ahmedabad

Built with love for India's street dogs.
